---
title: Bern Movement Lab Report
subtitle: Give me a subtitle
author:
  - name: Patric Eichelberger
    orcid: 0000-0003-2223-6113
    email: patric.eichelberger@bfh.ch
    # attributes:
    #   corresponding: true
    affiliations:
      - id: bfh
        name: Bern University of Applied Sciences
        department: School of Health Professions
        group: Physiotherapy Research, Bern Movement Lab
        address: Murtenstrasse 10
        city: Bern
        country: Switzerland
        postal-code: 3008
date: last-modified
# date-format: "[Last Updated on] MMMM, YYYY"
date-format: "DD.MM.YYYY"

abstract: |
  Ipsum nostra facilisis sapien nullam. Facilisi himenaeos pharetra ultricies scelerisque non fusce quisque aliquam netus tellus. Dictum tellus et sociis quisque ornare ad a natoque magna blandit. Tortor duis aptent cursus lacus inceptos tristique magnis dictumst. Taciti varius nascetur aliquet hac ornare vitae ultricies. Rhoncus primis purus morbi aliquet quam cubilia nullam malesuada ridiculus.
keywords: [template, demo]
# thanks: Thanks to BML contributors

## Bibliography meta-information ##
reference-section-title: Bibliography  # adjust name of reference section
bibliography: bibliography.bib
# You an also use a local CSL file
csl: https://www.zotero.org/styles/ieee
    
## Formats ##
format:
  # bml-report-pdf: default
  bml-report-pdf:
    # Set alternative fonts here
    mainfont: Unit Rounded Pro
    mainfontoptions:
      - UprightFont = *-Light
---

# Introduction

*TODO* Create an example file that demonstrates the formatting and features of your format.

Jump height according to Moir et al. [@Moir2008]

# More Information

You can learn more about controlling the appearance of PDF output here: <https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/pdf-basics.html>

# References

::: {#refs}
:::

\setcounter{section}{0}
\renewcommand{\thesection}{\Alph{section}}

# Anhang {.appendix}

## First appendix {#sec-app-first}
